headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Cooper Companies, Raises Price Target to $76
summary: Citigroup  analyst Joanne Wuensch   maintains Cooper Companies (NASDAQ:COO) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $69 to $76.
